title: Lack of interior $L^q$ bounds for stable solutions to elliptic equations
summary: We consider stable solutions of semilinear elliptic equations of the form $-Δu=f(u)$ in a bounded domain $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^N$. In a well-known paper \cite{cfrs}, Cabré, Figalli, Ros-Oton and Serra obtained interior estimates for the $W^{1,2}$-norm of $u$ in terms of the $L^1$-norm of $u$ and proved interior Hölder regularity for dimensions $N\leq 9$. All these results rely on the assumption that $f$ is nonnegative. We show that, for general nonlinearities $f\in C^\infty(\mathbb{R})$, it is impossible, in any dimension $N\geq 1$, to obtain an interior $L^q$ estimate in terms of the $L^p$-norm of $u$ whenever $1\leq p<q\leq \infty$.

AI.tldr: 证明了对于一般非线性项f，不可能通过u的L^p范数控制其L^q范数（当p<q时）
AI.motivation: 研究半线性椭圆方程稳定解的正则性估计问题。Cabré等人先前在f非负条件下得到了W^{1,2}和Hölder正则性估计，本文探讨当f为一般光滑非线性项时，这类估计是否仍然成立。
AI.techniques: 反证法构造反例，通过构造特定的非线性项f和解u，证明不可能存在从L^p到L^q的估计。可能涉及变分方法、能量估计和反例构造技术。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意维数N≥1和一般光滑非线性项f，当1≤p<q≤∞时，不可能通过u的L^p范数控制其L^q范数。这是对Cabré等人结果的否定性补充。
AI.significance: 揭示了稳定解正则性估计对非线性项符号的敏感性，表明f非负条件是先前结果的关键假设。为半线性椭圆方程正则性理论提供了重要限制条件，指导后续研究需考虑更精细的假设。

title: Data assimilation for the barotropic Navier-Stokes system
summary: We consider a continuous data assimilation method for the barotropic Navier--Stokes system. The observed solution is supposed to be bounded on the whole time period of observation, while the synchronized solution, usually provided by a numerical method, belongs to the class of dissipative solutions that is considerably larger than the class of conventional weak solutions. A complete synchronization is shown on any compact prediction interval provided the nudging parameters are chosen appropriately.

AI.tldr: 提出了针对正压Navier-Stokes系统的连续数据同化方法，在适当选择参数下实现了完全同步。
AI.motivation: 研究正压Navier-Stokes系统的数据同化问题，解决观测解与同步解在不同函数空间中的同步问题，其中观测解在整个观测时间段有界，而同步解属于更广泛的耗散解类。
AI.techniques: 使用连续数据同化方法（nudging方法），基于耗散解理论框架，通过适当选择nudging参数实现同步。
AI.main_theorems: 在适当选择nudging参数条件下，证明了在任何紧预测区间上观测解与同步解之间的完全同步，即使同步解属于比传统弱解更广泛的耗散解类。
AI.significance: 扩展了Navier-Stokes系统数据同化的理论框架，允许同步解属于更一般的函数空间，增强了数据同化方法的鲁棒性和适用范围。

title: Half Strong Ill-Posedness of $2 \frac{1}{2}$D Electron Magnetohydrodynamics with Fractional Resistivity
summary: We study the $2\frac{1}{2}$D electron magnetohydrodynamics (MHD): the electron MHD system that has $3$D magnetic field but is independent of $z$-variable. We establish a "half" strong ill-posedness result in $2\frac{1}{2}$D electron MHD with fractional resistivity $(-Δ)^α$ in the supercritical Sobolev space $H^β\times H^{β-1}$ for $3<β<4-2α$. Specifically, we construct small initial data $(a_0,b_0)$ whose solution develops a norm inflation in $a$ but the norm of $b$ remains small.

AI.tldr: 证明了2.5维电子磁流体动力学在超临界Sobolev空间中具有"半强"不适定性
AI.motivation: 研究2.5维电子磁流体动力学系统的适定性问题，该系统具有3维磁场但独立于z变量，包含分数电阻率项
AI.techniques: 构造特殊的小初始数据，证明在超临界Sobolev空间中存在范数膨胀现象，使用分数拉普拉斯算子和Sobolev空间分析
AI.main_theorems: 在超临界Sobolev空间H^β×H^{β-1}中(3<β<4-2α)，构造初始数据(a_0,b_0)使得解在a分量上发生范数膨胀，而b分量范数保持小
AI.significance: 揭示了2.5维电子MHD系统在超临界正则性下的强不适定性，为理解这类系统的数学性质提供了重要洞见

title: Stability and blow-up for a suspension bridge plate model with fractional damping and memory
summary: We investigate a suspension bridge model described by a nonlinear plate equation incorporating internal fractional damping and infinite memory effects. The system also includes a nonlinear source term that may induce instability. Using semigroup theory, we first establish the local well-posedness of solutions in an appropriate energy space. We then derive conditions ensuring global existence and exponential stability of solutions. In contrast, when the initial energy is negative, we prove that solutions blow up in finite time, revealing a threshold phenomenon governing the long-term dynamics of the system. To complement the analytical results, we construct a numerical approximation using Summation-By-Parts finite differences with Simultaneous Approximation Terms (SBP-SAT) for spatial discretization and a Newmark scheme for time integration. The scheme preserves the structural properties of the continuous energy framework. Numerical experiments illustrate the stability and blow-up regimes predicted by the theoretical analysis.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有分数阻尼和无限记忆效应的非线性板方程描述的悬索桥模型的适定性、稳定性与爆破阈值现象
AI.motivation: 研究悬索桥的非线性动力学模型，该模型包含分数阻尼、无限记忆效应和非线性源项，旨在理解此类系统的长期动力学行为，特别是稳定性与爆破之间的阈值现象
AI.techniques: 半群理论建立局部适定性；能量方法分析全局存在性和指数稳定性；构造SBP-SAT有限差分空间离散和Newmark时间积分格式；数值模拟验证理论结果
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在适当能量空间中建立局部适定性；2. 给出全局存在和指数稳定性的充分条件；3. 当初值能量为负时证明有限时间爆破；4. 构造保持连续能量框架结构性质的数值格式
AI.significance: 为具有分数阻尼和记忆效应的非线性板方程提供了完整的数学理论框架，揭示了稳定性与爆破的阈值现象，发展了保持结构性质的数值方法，对工程结构动力学分析有重要应用价值

title: Global conservative weak solutions and global strong solutions for a class of weakly dissipative nonlinear dispersive wave equations
summary: In this paper, we study the global existence of solutions of the Cauchy problem for a class of weakly dissipative nonlinear dispersive wave equations $u_t-u_{xxt}+(f\left(u\right))_x-(f\left(u\right))_{xxx}+\left(g\left(u\right)+\frac{f^{\prime\prime}\left(u\right)}{2}u_x^2\right)_x+λ\left(u-u_{xx}\right)=0$. This includes the weakly dissipative Camassa-Holm equation and the weakly dissipative hyperelastic rod wave equation as special cases. Specifically, we establish three global existence results: one concerning the energy conservative weak solutions in a time-weighted $H^1$ space, and the other two concerning strong solutions, which include the cases of small initial data and sign-changing initial data. Our results recover and extend many known results for several classical models.

AI.tldr: 研究弱耗散非线性色散波方程柯西问题解的全局存在性，推广了Camassa-Holm方程和超弹性杆波方程的结果
AI.motivation: 研究一类弱耗散非线性色散波方程的柯西问题，这类方程包含弱耗散Camassa-Holm方程和弱耗散超弹性杆波方程作为特例，旨在建立解的全局存在性理论
AI.techniques: 使用时间加权空间方法，结合能量守恒弱解和强解分析，处理小初值和变号初值情况
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三个全局存在性结果：时间加权H^1空间中的能量守恒弱解，以及小初值和变号初值情况下的强解存在性
AI.significance: 推广了经典模型的结果，为弱耗散非线性色散波方程提供了统一的全局存在性理论框架

title: Approximation Analysis of a Parabolic-Parabolic Chemotaxis Model with Logarithmic Nonlinearity
summary:
We consider the Keller-Segel system with logical source  egin{align*}  egin{cases} u_t =

AI.tldr: 证明了带逻辑源的Keller-Segel系统在特定条件下存在全局经典解
AI.motivation: 研究带逻辑源的Keller-Segel系统，该系统描述细胞趋化现象，逻辑源项表示细胞的自然生长和衰减，目标是证明在特定条件下系统存在全局经典解
AI.techniques: 使用正则化方法、能量估计、最大模估计，以及利用扩散项φ(u)和对数函数的关系，结合逻辑源项f(u)的性质来控制解的爆破
AI.main_theorems: 在光滑有界域Ω⊂ℝⁿ(n≥2)中，当φ和ψ分别受对数函数和多项式控制，且逻辑源项f满足一定正则性条件时，Neumann初边值问题对所有充分正则的非负初值存在全局定义、一致有界的经典解
AI.significance: 扩展了Keller-Segel系统的理论结果，为带逻辑源的趋化模型提供了全局存在性理论，对生物数学中细胞聚集现象的研究具有重要意义

title: Equivalence of Uniform Polyconvexity and Almgren Uniform Ellipticity for Lipschitz $Q$-Graph Test Pairs
summary: We investigate the relationship between uniform polyconvexity of anisotropic geometric integrands and Almgren's uniform ellipticity. We first establish the converse implication for uniform ellipticity with respect to polyhedral test pairs, thereby strengthening earlier results. Our main theorem shows that uniform polyconvexity is equivalent to Almgren's uniform ellipticity with respect to Lipschitz $Q$-graph test pairs, building on techniques developed by De Rosa, Lei, and Young. As a consequence, we show that for a classical integrand, uniform polyconvexity is equivalent to uniform quasiconvexity of the associated $Q$-integrand for every~$Q \in \natp$.

AI.tldr: 建立了各向异性几何被积函数的均匀多凸性与Almgren均匀椭圆性之间的等价关系
AI.motivation: 研究各向异性几何被积函数中均匀多凸性与Almgren均匀椭圆性之间的关系，这是几何变分问题和几何测度理论中的核心问题
AI.techniques: 基于De Rosa、Lei和Young发展的技术，使用多面体测试对和Lipschitz Q-图测试对的分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于多面体测试对，均匀多凸性蕴含Almgren均匀椭圆性；2. 对于Lipschitz Q-图测试对，均匀多凸性与Almgren均匀椭圆性等价；3. 经典被积函数的均匀多凸性等价于相关Q-被积函数对所有Q∈ℕ的均匀拟凸性
AI.significance: 加强了各向异性几何变分理论中的基本等价关系，为几何测度理论和几何偏微分方程提供了重要的分析工具

title: Generalized Reducibility and Growth of Sobolev Norms
summary: We introduce the concept of {\it generalized reducibility}, which provides a flexible framework for analyzing the long-time behavior of solutions to quadratic quantum Hamiltonians. As an application of this notion, for many prescribed sub-exponential growth rates $f(t)$, either monotone or oscillatory, we explicitly construct time-decaying perturbations of the one-dimensional quantum harmonic oscillator such that the Sobolev norms of solutions grow at rate $f(t)$.

AI.tldr: 提出广义可约性概念，为二次量子哈密顿量解的长时间行为分析提供灵活框架，并构造出具有任意预定亚指数增长率的解。
AI.motivation: 研究二次量子哈密顿量解的长时间行为，特别是Sobolev范数的增长问题。传统方法在处理具有时间衰减扰动的系统时存在局限性，需要更灵活的框架来分析解的增长率。
AI.techniques: 引入广义可约性概念，构造具有预定增长率的扰动哈密顿量，使用二次量子系统的可约性理论，结合时间衰减扰动和Sobolev范数分析。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意预定的亚指数增长率f(t)，无论是单调还是振荡的，都能显式构造一维量子谐振子的时间衰减扰动，使得解的Sobolev范数以速率f(t)增长。
AI.significance: 为量子系统长时间行为分析提供了新框架，揭示了二次哈密顿量解的增长率可以任意预定，对量子动力学、稳定性理论和可积系统研究有重要理论意义。

title: Well-posedness issues for the generalized Benjamin--Bona--Mahony equation
summary:
In this paper, we consider the one-dimensional generalized Benjamin--Bona--Mahony (gBBM) equation \[(1-\partial_x^2)u_t+(u+u^p)_x=0,\qquad p=2,3,4,\dots,\] posed either on the real line $\mathbb R$ or on the torus $\mathbb T$. This equation may be viewed as a regularized model for the propagation of long-crested surface water waves. The main results of this work are threefold:
  \medskip
  First, we establish \emph{unconditional local well-posedness} in the class $C([0,T];H^s)$ without imposing any auxiliary spaces for \[s\ge \frac{p-2}{2p},\] which is \emph{sharp} in the sense that the multilinear estimate in $H^s$ is optimal. In addition, we prove \emph{unconditional uniqueness} for all distributional solutions in $L^\infty((0,T);H^s)$.
  \medskip
  Second, we show that below this regularity threshold, the flow map cannot be of class $C^p$. Precisely, if the flow map is well-defined and continuous near the origin from $H^s$ to $C([0,T];H^s)$ for every $s<\frac{p-2}{2p}$, then it cannot be of class $C^p$ at the origin. The proof is based on a high-to-low frequency interaction, implemented differently on $\mathbb R$ and $\mathbb T$.
  \medskip
  Third, in the odd-power case, we prove \emph{global well-posedness} below $H^1$ in the following cases: $p=3$ with $s\ge \frac14$, and $p=5$ with $s>\frac12$. To the best of our knowledge, these are the first global well-posedness results in the Sobolev framework for the generalized BBM equation below $H^1$. The argument is based on the Bona--Tzvetkov approach \cite{BT}, while being initially inspired by Bourgain's high--low method \cite{Bourgain1998, Bourgain1999}. A key new ingredient is the use of a Hamiltonian conservation law below the $H^1$ energy level. This allows us to control the higher-degree nonlinear contributions in the energy estimate, thereby preventing the Grönwall iteration from blowing up.

AI.tldr: 建立了广义BBM方程在临界正则性下的无条件局部适定性、流映射的C^p正则性阈值以及奇数幂情形的全局适定性结果
AI.motivation: 研究一维广义Benjamin-Bona-Mahony方程，该方程作为长波表面水波传播的正则化模型，需要建立其适定性理论，特别是临界正则性下的局部适定性、流映射的正则性阈值以及全局适定性
AI.techniques: 使用最优多线性估计建立无条件局部适定性；通过高低频相互作用证明流映射的C^p正则性阈值；结合Bona-Tzvetkov方法和Bourgain高低频分解，利用Hamilton守恒律控制能量估计中的高阶非线性项
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在临界正则性s≥(p-2)/(2p)下建立无条件局部适定性和无条件唯一性；2. 证明当s<(p-2)/(2p)时流映射不能是C^p类；3. 对奇数幂情形(p=3,5)建立H^1以下的全局适定性结果
AI.significance: 首次建立了广义BBM方程在临界正则性下的最优适定性理论，给出了流映射正则性的精确阈值，并获得了H^1以下的第一个全局适定性结果，对非线性色散波方程理论有重要贡献

title: Weak Harnack inequality and Cartan property for nonlocal $W^{s,1}$-minimizers
summary: We establish a weak Harnack inequality for nonlocal $W^{s,1}$-subminimizers in a complete, connected, doubling metric measure space where $0<s<1$. As a corollary, we prove that $W^{s,1}$-subminimizers are semicontinuous, up to a suitable choice of pointwise representative. We then prove \emph{Cartan-type properties} for $W^{s,1}$-superminimizers. The theory turns out to be mostly analogous with the local case of BV super- and subminimizers. Our results seem to be new even in the classical Euclidean setting.

AI.tldr: 在度量测度空间中建立了非局部W^{s,1}-次极小元的弱Harnack不等式及其连续性
AI.motivation: 研究非局部变分问题中的正则性理论，将经典的BV极小元理论推广到分数阶Sobolev空间W^{s,1}情形，即使在欧氏空间中也是新结果
AI.techniques: 使用度量测度空间框架，结合加倍条件和连通性，建立弱Harnack不等式，通过Cartan型性质分析超极小元
AI.main_theorems: 1. W^{s,1}-次极小元的弱Harnack不等式；2. W^{s,1}-次极小元的半连续性（适当点态代表元）；3. W^{s,1}-超极小元的Cartan型性质
AI.significance: 将局部BV极小元理论系统推广到非局部情形，为分数阶变分问题和非局部PDE的正则性分析提供理论基础，即使在经典欧氏空间也是新贡献

title: Removing small wavenumber constraints in Side B of the Probe Method
summary: The Probe Method is an analytical reconstruction scheme for inverse obstacle problems utilizing the Dirichlet-to-Neumann map associated with the governing partial differential equation. It consists of two distinct parts: Side A and Side B. Both are based on the indicator sequence which is calculated from the Dirichlet-to-Neumann map acting on "needle-like" specialized solution of the governing equation for the background medium, whose energy is concentrated on an arbitrary given needle inside. In Side A, the limit of the indicator sequence-referred to as the indicator function-is computed before the needles touch the obstacle, and the boundary is identified as the point where this function first blows up. In contrast, Side B states the blow-up of the indicator sequence after the needles have come into contact with the obstacle. For the Helmholtz equation, the validity of Side B has long required a small wavenumber constraint. This paper finally removes this long-standing restriction, establishing the method's applicability for broader cases.

AI.tldr: 移除了Helmholtz方程探针法中Side B对小波数的限制，建立了该方法在更广泛情况下的适用性
AI.motivation: 探针法是逆障碍物问题的重要解析重建方法，由Side A和Side B两部分组成。对于Helmholtz方程，Side B的长期有效性一直受到小波数约束的限制，这限制了方法的适用范围。
AI.techniques: 探针法（Probe Method），基于Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射和"针状"特殊解，分析指示序列的奇异性，通过指示函数的爆破点识别障碍物边界
AI.main_theorems: 移除了Helmholtz方程探针法中Side B对小波数的限制，证明了该方法在更广泛波数范围内的有效性
AI.significance: 扩展了探针法在Helmholtz方程逆障碍物问题中的适用范围，解决了长期存在的理论限制，增强了该方法在实际应用中的实用性

title: The Conformal Fractional--Logarithmic Laplacian on the Sphere: Yamabe Problems and Sharp Inequalities
summary: In this paper, we introduce the conformal fractional--logarithmic Laplacian on the unit sphere, defined as the derivative of the conformal fractional Laplacian with respect to the order parameter \(s\in(0,1)\). We investigate its fundamental analytic and spectral properties, including its relation to the conformal logarithmic Laplacian, its spectral representation, and the explicit form of its eigenvalues and eigenfunctions. We further establish its conformal covariance law and derive the associated Yamabe-type equation, proving its equivalence to the corresponding conformal equation in \(\mathbb R^N\) through stereographic projection. Finally, we apply this framework to sharp Sobolev-type inequalities, recovering the sharp logarithmic Sobolev inequality, revealing the failure of a naive fractional--logarithmic analogue, and establishing new sharp fractional--logarithmic inequalities.

AI.tldr: 论文引入了单位球面上的共形分数-对数拉普拉斯算子，研究了其解析与谱性质，并建立了相关的Yamabe型方程和尖锐Sobolev不等式。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于将分数拉普拉斯算子与对数拉普拉斯算子统一到共形几何框架中，特别是在球面几何背景下，探索分数阶参数s→0时的极限行为，建立分数-对数算子的系统理论。
AI.techniques: 使用共形几何方法、谱理论分析、球面调和函数理论、立体投影变换、变分原理和尖锐不等式技术，通过参数导数构造分数-对数算子。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果包括：共形分数-对数拉普拉斯算子的明确定义和基本性质；谱表示和特征值/特征函数的显式公式；共形协变定律；与R^N中对应方程的等价性；以及新的尖锐分数-对数Sobolev不等式。
AI.significance: 理论意义在于统一了分数和对数拉普拉斯算子的共形几何理论，为几何分析提供了新工具，建立了球面与欧氏空间之间的对应关系，并发展了新的尖锐函数不等式理论。

title: Multiplicity of Solutions to the Brezis-Nirenberg Problem on Hyperbolic Spaces
summary: This article investigates the multiplicity of solutions to the Brezis-Nirenberg problem on smooth bounded domains in the hyperbolic space $\mathbb{B}^N$ for $N \ge 4$. Specifically, we study the critical semilinear equation $-Δ_{\mathbb{B}^N} u = λu + |u|^{2^*-2}u$ under Dirichlet boundary conditions for $λ> \frac{N(N-2)}{4}$. Overcoming the analytic challenges induced by the hyperbolic geometry and the intricate concentration profiles of Palais-Smale sequences, we establish the existence of multiple pairs of nontrivial solutions. Using the equivariant Ljusternik-Schnirelmann category, we obtain lower bounds on the number of solutions depending on the position of the parameter $λ$ relative to the Dirichlet spectrum of the Laplace-Beltrami operator.

AI.tldr: 证明了双曲空间中Brezis-Nirenberg问题在λ大于临界值时的多重解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究双曲空间上临界半线性方程的多重解问题，克服双曲几何带来的分析挑战，特别是Palais-Smale序列的复杂集中行为
AI.techniques: 使用等变Ljusternik-Schnirelmann范畴理论，分析双曲几何中的谱理论，处理临界指数非线性项和Dirichlet边界条件
AI.main_theorems: 建立了当λ>N(N-2)/4时多重非平凡解的存在性，给出了解数量依赖于参数λ相对于Laplace-Beltrami算子Dirichlet谱位置的显式下界
AI.significance: 将欧氏空间中经典的Brezis-Nirenberg问题推广到双曲空间，揭示了非平坦几何对临界问题解结构的影响，发展了双曲空间中变分方法的应用

title: Global regularity and free boundary geometry in the planar Choné-Rochet model
summary: In this paper, we study minimizers of the Choné--Rochet variational problem in dimension two. We first establish global $C^1$ regularity on arbitrary bounded convex domains, and then prove global $C^{1,1}$ regularity on bounded strictly convex domains or, more generally, whenever the zero set of $u$ has positive measure. Next, we construct smooth bounded convex domains with a flat boundary segment for which no prescribed modulus of continuity controls the gradient; this shows that, without additional geometric assumptions, global $C^1$ regularity is optimal. Finally, we prove that the tamed free boundary (that is, the interface between the strictly convex and non-strictly convex regions of the solution) is locally a $C^1$ embedded curve, significantly strengthening previously known regularity results.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维Choné-Rochet变分问题极小元的全局正则性理论，证明了最优的正则性结果并加强了自由边界的正则性
AI.motivation: 研究Choné-Rochet变分问题在二维情形下的正则性理论，该问题涉及凸函数极小化问题，与最优输运、几何偏微分方程等领域密切相关
AI.techniques: 凸分析、变分方法、自由边界理论、正则性估计、几何测度论、先验估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在任意有界凸域上建立全局C¹正则性；2. 在有界严格凸域或解的零测集具有正测度时建立全局C¹,¹正则性；3. 构造反例证明全局C¹正则性是最优的；4. 证明驯化自由边界是局部C¹嵌入曲线
AI.significance: 这是Choné-Rochet变分问题正则性理论的重大进展，为相关几何偏微分方程和最优输运问题提供了新的工具，特别是自由边界正则性的加强具有重要意义

title: Regularized Brascamp-Lieb inequalities via Optimal Transport and Study of Equality Cases
summary: We consider regularized Brascamp-Lieb inequalities using the theory of optimal transportation, more precisely an anisotropic version of Caffarelli's contraction theorem. Furthermore, we provide a full picture concerning the issues of finiteness of the Brascamp-Lieb constant and of the existence of Gaussian extremizers. Finally, we find all optimizers for these regularized Brascamp-Lieb inequalities by employing heat flow methods that were already used to settle this question for the non-regularized Brascamp-Lieb inequality, and give some interesting applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过最优传输理论和热流方法，系统研究了正则化Brascamp-Lieb不等式的高斯极值存在性、常数有限性及所有优化器的完全分类。
AI.motivation: Brascamp-Lieb不等式是调和分析和凸几何中的基本不等式，研究其正则化版本（引入额外参数）的极值问题、常数有限性以及高斯极值存在性等未解决问题。
AI.techniques: 使用最优传输理论（特别是Caffarelli收缩定理的各向异性版本）和热流方法，结合高斯测度分析和凸几何技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了正则化Brascamp-Lieb常数有限性的完整判据；2) 完全刻画了高斯极值存在条件；3) 找到了所有正则化Brascamp-Lieb不等式的优化器。
AI.significance: 为Brascamp-Lieb理论提供了正则化版本的完整理论框架，统一了极值存在性、常数有限性和优化器分类问题，在调和分析、凸几何和最优传输理论中有重要应用。

title: Calculus on Wave Fronts
summary: We define a deformation of the exterior derivative that is a bounded operator and preserves the symmetries of the geometry. It satisfies a modified wave equation that honors the strong Huygens principle in all dimensions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个外微分的变形算子，该算子有界且保持几何对称性，满足在所有维度都满足强惠更斯原理的修正波动方程。
AI.motivation: 研究波动方程和几何分析中的算子理论，旨在构造一个既保持几何对称性又满足强惠更斯原理的有界算子，解决传统外微分算子在波动方程理论中的局限性。
AI.techniques: 算子变形技术、几何不变性分析、波动方程理论、强惠更斯原理的数学表述、有界算子构造方法。
AI.main_theorems: 定义了一个外微分的变形算子，证明其有界性、保持几何对称性，且满足在所有维度都满足强惠更斯原理的修正波动方程。
AI.significance: 为波动方程理论提供了新的算子框架，连接了几何对称性和波动传播特性，可能在量子场论、广义相对论和偏微分方程理论中有重要应用。

title: Quantitative unique continuation for elliptic equations with Hölder continuous potentials
summary: We study quantitative unique continuation for second order elliptic equations with lower-order terms of Hölder regularity via a weighted frequency function method. We establish quantitative three-ball inequalities and corresponding vanishing-order bounds for Schrödinger equations with Hölder potentials and Hölder gradient terms, and corresponding results for elliptic equations with variable leading coefficients. Our results are quantitative with explicit dependence of Hölder norms in the three-ball inequalities. These fill in the gap for quantitative unique continuation between bounded potentials and $C^1$ potentials.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有Hölder正则性低阶项的椭圆方程定量唯一延拓理论，填补了有界势与C¹势之间的定量唯一延拓空白
AI.motivation: 研究具有Hölder正则性低阶项的二阶椭圆方程的定量唯一延拓问题，填补有界势与C¹势之间定量唯一延拓的理论空白
AI.techniques: 加权频率函数方法，建立定量三球不等式和消失阶估计
AI.main_theorems: 建立了具有Hölder势和Hölder梯度项的Schrödinger方程的定量三球不等式和消失阶界，以及变主系数椭圆方程的相应结果
AI.significance: 填补了定量唯一延拓理论中从有界势到C¹势之间的重要空白，结果具有显式的Hölder范数依赖关系，对椭圆方程理论有重要贡献

title: Traveling wave solutions to a general incompressible Navier-Stokes-Fourier system with free boundary
summary: We study traveling wave solutions to the free boundary problem associated to a generalized Navier-Stokes Fourier system, which models a viscous, incompressible, heat-conducting fluid. The fluid is assumed to occupy a horizontally infinite strip-like domain with flat rigid bottom and moving upper surface. The fluid is acted upon by gravity as well as external sources of bulk force and boundary stress and an external heat source. Additionally, we allow for temperature-dependent viscosity and capillary coefficients, the latter of which gives rise to Marangoni stresses on the free surface. We develop a small data well-posedness theory in Sobolev spaces that shows that if the sources of force, stress, and heat are small, then there exists a unique solution depending continuously on these data.

AI.tldr: 建立了广义Navier-Stokes Fourier系统自由边界问题的小数据适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有温度依赖粘性和毛细系数的粘性不可压缩热传导流体在重力、外力、边界应力和热源作用下的行波解，考虑水平无限带状区域（刚性底部和移动上表面）的自由边界问题
AI.techniques: Sobolev空间理论、小数据适定性分析、自由边界问题处理方法、Marangoni应力分析
AI.main_theorems: 当外力、应力和热源足够小时，在Sobolev空间中存在唯一且连续依赖于数据的解
AI.significance: 为具有温度依赖参数和自由边界的复杂流体系统建立了严格的数学理论基础，扩展了Navier-Stokes方程的研究框架，对理解Marangoni效应等物理现象有重要意义

title: Maximal inequalities and the decay of Fourier transforms of measures
summary:
It is shown that Schrödinger maximal inequalities over fractals are equivalent to the $L^2$ decay rates of Fourier transforms of fractal measures over the paraboloid. A similar connection is shown between the wave equation and cone averages.
  One implication is well-known and follows from the Kolmogorov-Seliverstov-Plessner method, but the other implication is nontrivial and relies on a variant of the Marstrand projection theorem.
  The idea of the proof is to insert an extra averaging parameter into a proof of Lucà and Rogers, which used a quantitative ergodic lemma instead of the Marstrand projection theorem. Lucà and Rogers gave a second proof of Bourgain's necessary condition $s\geq \frac{n}{2(n+1)}$ for Schrödinger solutions in $\mathbb{R}^{n+1}$ to converge pointwise a.e. back to the initial data as time tends to zero. One application of the main theorem in this article is a proof of Bourgain's necessary condition which does not use ergodic theory or number theory.

AI.tldr: 证明了薛定谔极大不等式与分形测度在抛物面上傅里叶变换的L²衰减率之间的等价性
AI.motivation: 研究分形上薛定谔方程解的点态收敛问题，特别是Bourgain提出的关于薛定谔解在时间趋于零时几乎处处收敛回初始数据的必要条件
AI.techniques: 使用Marstrand投影定理的变体，在Lucà和Rogers的证明中引入额外平均参数，替代了原有的定量遍历引理
AI.main_theorems: 1. 分形上薛定谔极大不等式与分形测度在抛物面上傅里叶变换L²衰减率的等价性；2. 波方程与锥平均的类似等价关系；3. 不使用遍历理论或数论证明了Bourgain的必要条件s≥n/2(n+1)
AI.significance: 建立了分形上薛定谔方程与傅里叶分析之间的深刻联系，为研究分形上偏微分方程的点态收敛问题提供了新方法，简化了Bourgain必要条件的证明

title: Higher-order derivative estimates for the parabolic Lamé system on a smooth bounded domain
summary: We consider the parabolic Lamé system on a bounded domain. We focus on two types of inequalities for higher-order derivatives of solutions. The first is related to an $L^p$-$L^p$ estimate locally in time in the Lebesgue space setting, which includes the endpoint cases $p=1$ and $p=\infty$. The second concerns an equivalent norm of Besov spaces by means of the solution of the parabolic Lamé system.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了有界域上抛物型Lamé系统的高阶导数估计，包括局部时间的L^p-L^p估计和Besov空间的等价范数刻画。
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型Lamé系统在有界域上的正则性估计问题，这是弹性力学中描述线性弹性体热传导过程的基本方程。需要建立高阶导数的定量估计，为分析解的正则性和发展数值方法提供理论基础。
AI.techniques: 使用调和分析技术，特别是Lebesgue空间和Besov空间理论；发展抛物型方程的极大函数估计和奇异积分算子方法；处理端点情况p=1和p=∞的估计问题。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 局部时间L^p-L^p估计：对抛物型Lamé系统建立高阶导数的L^p-L^p估计，包括端点情况p=1和p=∞；2. Besov空间等价范数：通过抛物型Lamé系统的解来刻画Besov空间的等价范数。
AI.significance: 为弹性力学中的热弹性问题提供了重要的正则性估计工具；发展了抛物型系统在端点情况下的估计理论；建立了抛物型方程与函数空间理论之间的新联系，对偏微分方程理论和应用数学有重要意义。

title: Nonexistence of multi-bubble radial solutions to the 3D energy critical wave equation
summary: In this work we consider the focusing, energy-critical wave equation in 3D radial case. It has been verified that any global or type II blow-up solution decomposes into a superposition of several decoupled grounds states, a free wave and a small error, as time tends to infinity or the blow-up time. This is usually called soliton resolution. However, all known examples of soliton resolution in the 3D radial case come with no more than one soliton. In this work we prove the nonexistence of any global or type II blow up solution with two or more solitons, thus give a complete classification of asymptotic behaviours of radial solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了3D径向聚焦能量临界波方程不存在两个或更多孤立子的全局解或II型爆破解，完成了径向解渐近行为的完全分类
AI.motivation: 研究3D径向聚焦能量临界波方程的渐近行为分类问题，已知的孤立子分解（soliton resolution）结果在3D径向情况下最多只出现一个孤立子，需要验证是否存在多个孤立子的解
AI.techniques: 波方程分析、能量临界性理论、径向对称性方法、II型爆破分析、渐近分解技术、多孤立子相互作用排除方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在3D径向聚焦能量临界波方程中，不存在包含两个或更多孤立子的全局解或II型爆破解，从而完成了径向解渐近行为的完全分类
AI.significance: 彻底解决了3D径向能量临界波方程的渐近行为分类问题，排除了多孤立子解的存在性，为波方程的动力学行为提供了完整的理论框架，对非线性波方程理论有重要贡献

title: Time-periodic leapfrogging vortex rings in the 3D Euler equations
summary: We prove the existence of time-periodic leapfrogging vortex rings for the three-dimensional incompressible Euler equations, thereby providing a rigorous realization of a phenomenon first conjectured by Helmholtz (1858). In the leapfrogging motion, two coaxial vortex rings periodically exchange positions, a striking behavior repeatedly observed in experiments and numerical simulations, yet lacking complete mathematical justification. Our construction relies on a desingularization of two interacting vortex filaments within the contour dynamics formulation, which yields a Hamiltonian description of nearly concentric vortex rings. The main difficulty stems from a singular small-divisor problem arising in the linearized transport dynamics, where the effective time scale degenerates with the ring thickness parameter. To overcome this obstruction, we develop a degenerate KAM-type analysis combined with pseudo-differential operator techniques to control the linearized dynamics around symmetric configurations. Combining these tools with a Nash-Moser iteration scheme, we construct families of nontrivial time-periodic solutions in an almost uniformly translating frame. This establishes the first rigorous construction of classical leapfrogging motion for axisymmetric Euler flows without swirl, with no restriction on the time interval of existence.

AI.tldr: 首次为三维不可压缩欧拉方程构造了时间周期性的蛙跳涡环解，严格实现了Helmholtz在1858年预言的物理现象。
AI.motivation: 研究背景是Helmholtz在1858年预言的涡环蛙跳现象——两个同轴涡环周期性交换位置，这一现象在实验和数值模拟中反复观察到，但缺乏完整的数学证明。核心数学问题是为三维欧拉方程构造时间周期性的蛙跳涡环解。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：1) 轮廓动力学框架下的涡丝去奇化方法；2) 处理线性化输运动力学中的奇异小除数问题；3) 退化KAM型分析与伪微分算子技术结合；4) Nash-Moser迭代方案；5) 在几乎匀速平移的参考系中构造解。
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：证明了三维不可压缩欧拉方程存在时间周期性的蛙跳涡环解，这是无旋轴对称欧拉流中经典蛙跳运动的首次严格构造，且对存在时间区间没有限制。
AI.significance: 理论意义重大：1) 首次为经典流体力学现象提供严格数学基础；2) 发展了处理退化小除数问题的新方法；3) 为涡动力学中的周期解理论开辟新方向；4) 连接了实验观察与数学理论之间的鸿沟。

title: Acoustic limit of Boltzmann equations for gas mixture
summary: In this paper, we study the hydrodynamic and acoustic limit from Boltzmann equations for two species gas mixture with potential $γ\in \left(-3, 1\right]$. % in the whole space $(x \in \mathbb{R}^3)$.Here the particle masses are different which derives to the loss of symmetry to the linearized collision operator. %This paper resolves it precisely by using a framework based on vector-valued functions. We construct the hydrodynamic limit for two species based on the Hilbert expansion method when the Knudsen number is small. The key observation is the precise properties of the linearized collision operators, including the extra operators due to the different particle masses $(m^A \neq m^B)$. In additional, the acoustic limit of the Boltzmann equations for gas mixtures is rigorously justified by assuming the strength of the initial data depends on the Knudsen number.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了两种不同质量粒子气体混合物的Boltzmann方程在Knudsen数趋于零时的流体力学极限和声学极限
AI.motivation: 研究两种不同质量粒子气体混合物的Boltzmann方程的极限行为，由于粒子质量不同导致线性化碰撞算子失去对称性，这是传统单组分气体理论无法直接处理的问题
AI.techniques: Hilbert展开方法、向量值函数框架、对线性化碰撞算子的精确分析（包括由不同粒子质量引起的额外算子）、Knudsen数相关的初始数据假设
AI.main_theorems: 建立了气体混合物Boltzmann方程的流体力学极限（当Knudsen数小时）和声学极限（当初始数据强度依赖于Knudsen数时）的严格数学证明
AI.significance: 扩展了Boltzmann方程的极限理论到多组分气体混合物情形，特别是处理了不同粒子质量带来的数学困难，为多组分流体力学提供了严格的数学基础

title: Hausdorff Dimension of Union of Lines that Cover a Function Graph: Applications to PDEs
summary: Recent results in geometric measure theory have explored the minimal Hausdorff dimension of a union of lines covering a curve in the plane. While it is known that the union of covering lines for a nonlinear $C^2$ curve must have a Hausdorff dimension of exactly 2, the dimension can drop to 1 if the curve is merely continuously differentiable. In this paper, we bridge the gap between these two regularity classes by establishing a sharp dimensional bound for intermediate Hölder regularities. We prove that, for any nonlinear function $f\in C^{1,α}([0,1])$ with $0 < α\leq 1$, the union of any family of lines covering the graph of $f$ over a subset of full measure must have a Hausdorff dimension of at least $1+α$. We demonstrate that this lower bound is strictly sharp by utilizing the fractional Devil's staircase to construct a function graph and a corresponding covering family of lines whose union has a Hausdorff dimension of exactly $1+α$. Finally, we apply this geometric framework to nonlinear partial differential equations, proving that any spacetime observability set intersecting all characteristic lines of the inviscid Burgers' equation must have a Hausdorff dimension of at least $α$.

AI.tldr: 建立了覆盖非线性Hölder连续函数图像所需直线并集的Hausdorff维数下界为1+α的精确结果
AI.motivation: 几何测度论中研究覆盖平面曲线所需直线并集的最小Hausdorff维数：已知C²曲线需要维数2，C¹曲线可降至1，本文填补Hölder正则性中间情形的空白
AI.techniques: 几何测度论方法、Hausdorff维数估计、分数阶Devil's staircase构造、特征线分析、非线性PDE的几何框架
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于任意非线性f∈C¹,α([0,1])，覆盖其图像（在全测度子集上）的直线并集的Hausdorff维数至少为1+α；2. 该下界是精确的，通过分数阶Devil's staircase构造达到维数1+α；3. 应用于无粘Burgers方程，证明任何与所有特征线相交的时空观测集必须具有至少α的Hausdorff维数
AI.significance: 填补了不同正则性曲线覆盖问题中的理论空白，建立了Hölder正则性与覆盖维数的精确关系，为PDE观测性理论提供了新的几何测度论工具

title: Delay is Necessary for a Potential to Achieve Exponential Stabilization of the Wave Equation via Internal Control
summary: In this work, we study the stabilization of the wave equation using an internal delayed potential. Interestingly, the stabilization mechanism is entirely induced by the delay, since exponential stabilization cannot be achieved in its absence. We first prove the well-posedness of the associated initial--boundary value problem. Then, thanks to the parametric analysis of the corresponding quasipolynomial, we design a delayed po tential feedback law which, together with appropriate initial conditions, ensures the exponential decay rate for the resulting closed-loop system. The control of the transverse vibration of a string illustrates the effectiveness of the result.

AI.tldr: 证明了延迟势反馈能够指数稳定波动方程，而延迟是实现指数稳定的必要条件
AI.motivation: 研究波动方程的内部延迟势反馈稳定问题，探索延迟在控制系统中的积极作用，解决传统无延迟控制无法实现指数稳定的局限性
AI.techniques: 拟多项式参数分析、初边值问题适定性理论、延迟反馈控制设计、闭环系统稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了延迟势反馈控制律与适当初值条件能确保闭环系统的指数衰减率，并通过弦的横向振动控制验证结果有效性
AI.significance: 揭示了延迟在控制系统中的积极作用，为波动方程稳定提供了新方法，对延迟控制系统理论有重要贡献

title: Viscous evolution of a point vortex in a half-plane
summary: As a model for vortex-wall interactions, we consider the two-dimensional incompressible Navier--Stokes equations in the half-plane $R^2_+$ with no-slip boundary condition and point vortices as initial data. We focus on the paradigmatic example of a single vortex in an otherwise stagnant fluid, which is already quite challenging from a mathematical point of view. We prove that this system has a unique global solution for all values of the Reynolds number $|Γ|/ν$, where $Γ$ is the circulation of the vortex and $ν$ the kinematic viscosity of the fluid. The solution we construct has finite energy for positive times and converges to zero in energy norm as $t \to +\infty$. Uniqueness holds under the assumption that the solution is close to a Lamb--Oseen vortex for small times. To our knowledge, all previous results in domains with boundaries assume that the initial vorticity has small or zero atomic part. In our particular situation, we remove the smallness condition by decomposing the solution into a vortex and a boundary layer term, so that we can apply the techniques developed in the whole plane $R^2$ to avoid the difficulties related to the large circulation of the vortex.

AI.tldr: 证明了半平面上具有点涡初始条件和无滑移边界条件的Navier-Stokes方程存在唯一全局解，突破了以往对涡量原子部分需小或为零的限制。
AI.motivation: 研究涡旋与壁面相互作用的数学模型，考虑半平面上具有无滑移边界条件的二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程，以点涡作为初始条件。特别关注单个涡旋在静止流体中的情况，这在数学上具有挑战性。
AI.techniques: 将解分解为涡旋项和边界层项，应用在全平面R²上发展的技术，避免了大环量带来的困难；利用Lamb-Oseen涡作为参考解，在短时间内解接近该涡的条件下证明唯一性。
AI.main_theorems: 对于所有雷诺数|Γ|/ν，系统存在唯一全局解；构造的解在正时间具有有限能量，且当t→∞时能量范数收敛到零；在解在短时间内接近Lamb-Oseen涡的条件下证明唯一性。
AI.significance: 首次在有边界区域中移除了对初始涡量原子部分的小性或零性限制，为涡旋-壁面相互作用提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了Navier-Stokes方程在边界条件下的可解性理论。

title: Non-uniqueness of smooth solutions of the 5D magnetohydrodynamic equations from critical data
summary: Recently, Coiculescu and Palasek \cite{Coiculescu2025} shows the non-uniqueness of solutions for the 3D incompressible Navier-Stokes equations with initial data in $BMO^{-1}$. Inspired by their breakthrough work, we develop their schemes for the incompressible magnetohydrodynamic equations and obtain a similar result in 5 dimensional case. More precisely, we construct two distinct global solutions with a initial data, which has nonvanishing velocity and magnetic fields in $BMO^{-1}(\mathbb{T}^5)$.

AI.tldr: 将Navier-Stokes方程非唯一性结果推广到5维磁流体动力学方程
AI.motivation: 受Coiculescu和Palasek在3D不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程BMO^{-1}初值非唯一性突破性工作的启发，研究磁流体动力学方程在类似框架下的解非唯一性问题
AI.techniques: 基于Coiculescu-Palasek方案的推广，构造性方法，在BMO^{-1}空间框架下构建不同解
AI.main_theorems: 在5维环面上，对于具有非零速度和磁场分量的BMO^{-1}初值，构造了两个不同的全局解
AI.significance: 将Navier-Stokes方程非唯一性结果扩展到磁流体动力学，揭示了高维磁流体系统在临界空间中的病态行为，对理解磁流体方程适定性问题有重要意义

title: Semigroup decay for the wave equation with unbounded damping
summary: We study the damped wave equation with a damping coefficient which is possibly singular and unbounded at infinity. In general, zero belongs to the spectrum of the corresponding generator, which prevents a uniform (exponential) decay for the energy. However, for initial conditions in a suitable subspace, a detailed analysis of the resolvent norm for low frequencies leads to sharp polynomial time-decay rates for the solution and its energy.

AI.tldr: 研究具有奇异无界阻尼系数的阻尼波方程，在适当子空间上获得解的尖锐多项式衰减率
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异且可能在无穷远处无界的阻尼系数的阻尼波方程，这类问题中零通常属于生成算子的谱，导致能量无法获得一致（指数）衰减，需要探索在适当条件下的衰减行为
AI.techniques: 通过低频率处预解范数的精细分析，利用谱理论和半群理论，在适当子空间上研究解的长时间行为
AI.main_theorems: 对于初始条件在适当子空间中的情况，通过低频率预解范数的详细分析，获得了解及其能量的尖锐多项式时间衰减率
AI.significance: 扩展了阻尼波方程衰减理论到奇异无界阻尼系数情形，提供了处理谱包含零点的非一致衰减问题的分析方法，对偏微分方程长时间行为和稳定性理论有重要贡献

title: Large-scale harmonic measures and nontangential maximal functions in periodic homogenization
summary: In this paper, we consider the elliptic operators $\mathcal{L}_\varepsilon = -\nabla\cdot (A(X/\varepsilon) \nabla )$ with periodic coefficients in a bounded domain $Ω$ without any local smoothness assumption on $A = A(Y)$, where $\varepsilon \ll \text{diam}(Ω)$ is a microscopic scale. Due to the irregularity of the coefficients at $\varepsilon$ scale, we introduce the correct forms of the large-scale nontangential maximal functions for the Dirichlet, Neumann and regularity problems that measure the behaviors of solutions at an $\varepsilon$ distance away from the boundary. The $L^p$ estimates uniform in $\varepsilon$ are established for these nontangential maximal functions for the same and optimal ranges of $p$ as the Laplace operator in the Lipschitz or $C^1$ domains. With some additional regularity assumption on the coefficients, the large-scale estimates combined with the small-scale estimates recover the classical full-scale estimates of the nontangential maximal functions. Our proofs are based on the notion of large-scale $\mathcal{L}_\varepsilon$-harmonic measures, the periodic structure of operators in the transversal direction to the boundaries, and the homogenization tools, including convergence rates and large-scale regularity.

AI.tldr: 建立了周期系数椭圆算子在无局部光滑性假设下的大尺度非切向极大函数的L^p估计，并恢复经典全尺度估计
AI.motivation: 研究周期系数椭圆算子在微观尺度ε下的边界值问题，由于系数在ε尺度上的不规则性，需要引入适当的大尺度非切向极大函数来测量解在边界ε距离处的行为
AI.techniques: 使用大尺度L_ε-调和测度概念、边界横向方向的算子周期结构、以及均匀化工具（包括收敛速率和大尺度正则性）
AI.main_theorems: 建立了Dirichlet、Neumann和正则性问题的大尺度非切向极大函数的L^p估计，这些估计在ε上一致，且p的范围与Lipschitz或C^1域中Laplace算子的最优范围相同；在附加正则性假设下，大尺度估计与小尺度估计结合可恢复经典全尺度估计
AI.significance: 为周期系数椭圆算子在无局部光滑性假设下的边界值问题提供了统一的L^p理论，扩展了经典结果，在均匀化理论和偏微分方程边界值问题领域有重要意义

title: Lipschitz regularity for parabolic fractional $p$-Laplace equations
summary: We prove that local weak solutions to nonlocal parabolic $p$-Laplace equations are locally Lipschitz continuous in space, uniformly in time for every $1<p<\infty$ and $s \in (0,1)$ whenever $sp > p-1$. Our results hold for symmetric, translation-invariant kernels satisfying standard ellipticity bounds, including kernels that may be discontinuous and require only that the tail of the solution be bounded. In the linear case, our proof provides a different route avoiding blow up arguments and Liouville theorems.

AI.tldr: 证明了非局部抛物型p-Laplace方程局部弱解的空间局部Lipschitz连续性，对sp>p-1的所有p和s成立
AI.motivation: 研究非局部抛物型p-Laplace方程的正则性理论，这类方程在分数阶偏微分方程和变分问题中具有重要应用，需要建立解的空间正则性结果
AI.techniques: 使用非局部De Giorgi-Nash-Moser理论，避免爆炸论证和Liouville定理，处理对称平移不变核，包括可能不连续的核
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当sp>p-1时，非局部抛物型p-Laplace方程的局部弱解在空间上局部Lipschitz连续，且时间上一致成立
AI.significance: 扩展了非局部椭圆和抛物方程的正则性理论，为分数阶p-Laplace算子提供了重要的空间正则性结果，在线性情况下提供了避免传统方法的替代证明路径

title: Inverse Spectral Analysis of Singular Radial AKNS Operators
summary:
We study an inverse spectral problem for singular AKNS operators based on
  spectral data associated with two distinct values of the effective angular momentum
  parameter $κ\,$.
  Our main focus is the local inverse problem near the zero potential.
  For the pairs $(κ_1,κ_2)=(0,1)$, $(1,2)$ and $(0,3)\,$, we establish local
  uniqueness.
  For $(0,2)\,$, we prove that the Fréchet differential of the spectral map
  at the origin is injective, while the question whether its range is closed
  remains open.

AI.tldr: 研究奇异AKNS算子的逆谱问题，基于两个不同有效角动量参数κ的谱数据，在零势附近建立局部唯一性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究奇异AKNS算子的逆谱问题，该问题在数学物理中具有重要意义。通过两个不同有效角动量参数κ的谱数据来重构势函数，特别关注在零势附近的局部逆问题。
AI.techniques: 使用逆谱理论方法，分析谱映射的Fréchet微分，研究局部唯一性和谱映射的性质。
AI.main_theorems: 对于参数对(κ₁,κ₂)=(0,1)、(1,2)和(0,3)，证明了局部唯一性；对于(0,2)，证明了谱映射在原点处的Fréchet微分是单射，但其值域是否闭包的问题仍开放。
AI.significance: 为奇异AKNS算子的逆谱问题提供了新的理论结果，深化了对谱数据与势函数之间关系的理解，对可积系统和数学物理中的逆问题研究有重要贡献。

title: On the Well-posedness of Magnetic Schrödinger Equations with Unbounded Potentials
summary: We consider magnetic Schrödinger equations with sublinear magnetic potentials and subquadratic electric potentials on $\mathbb{R}^{d}$, as well as generalizations thereof. We obtain new results on the global well-posedness of the Cauchy problem with initial data in magnetic modulation spaces $M^{p}_{A}(\mathbb{R}^{d})$. Our results are achieved by approximating the solution in phase space using the magnetic Hamiltonian flow. This method includes the potentials as part of the generalized Schrödinger operator instead of treating them as perturbations, and thereby allows us to deal with unbounded potentials. For $A \equiv 0$, the space $M^{p}_{A}(\mathbb{R}^{d})$ reduces to the usual modulation space $M^{p}(\mathbb{R}^{d})$, for which relevant known results for the usual Schrödinger equation can be recovered.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有亚线性磁势和亚二次电势的磁薛定谔方程在磁调制空间中的全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有无界势能的磁薛定谔方程的柯西问题，特别是当磁势是亚线性、电势是亚二次时的全局适定性问题
AI.techniques: 通过相空间中的磁哈密顿流逼近解，将势能作为广义薛定谔算子的组成部分而非扰动处理
AI.main_theorems: 在磁调制空间M^p_A(ℝ^d)中获得了磁薛定谔方程柯西问题的全局适定性结果，当A≡0时退化为通常调制空间M^p(ℝ^d)的已知结果
AI.significance: 扩展了无界势能薛定谔方程的理论框架，为处理更一般的磁薛定谔方程提供了新方法，具有重要的理论价值

title: Quadratic flatness and Regularity for Codimension-One Varifolds with Bounded Anisotropic First Variation Part II
summary: In a previous paper we proved quadratic flatness and $\mathscr{C}^{2}$-rectifiability for codimension one varifolds $ V $ on open subsets of $ \mathbf{R}^{n+1} $ with bounded anisotropic mean curvature, under the hypothesis that $ \operatorname{spt} \| V \| $ has locally finite $ \mathscr{H}^{n} $ measure. In this paper we explore some fundamental consequences of this result. In particular, we extend Brakke's perpendicularity theorem to the anisotropic setting and we deduce the locality of the anisotropic mean curvature vector.

AI.tldr: 将Brakke垂直性定理推广到各向异性情形，并推导各向异性平均曲率向量的局部性
AI.motivation: 基于先前证明的二次平坦性和C²可矫正性结果，探索各向异性平均曲率有界余维1 varifolds的基本性质
AI.techniques: 利用varifold理论、各向异性几何测度论、先前建立的二次平坦性和C²可矫正性结果
AI.main_theorems: 1. 各向异性Brakke垂直性定理的推广；2. 各向异性平均曲率向量的局部性证明
AI.significance: 扩展了经典几何测度论结果到各向异性情形，为各向异性几何流和变分问题提供理论基础

title: Sharp capillary Sobolev inequality and Moser-Trudinger inequality outside convex domain
summary: The theory of sharp geometric inequality in $\mathbb{R}^n$ and inside convex cone has been well-developed, much less known for sharp capillary geometric inequality outside convex domain. Recently, Fusco-Julin-Morini-Pratelli \cite{FJMP} obtained sharp capillary isoperimetric inequality and make it possible to obtain the sharp capillary geometric inequality outside convex domain. In this paper, we establish the sharp capillary Sobolev inequality and Moser-Trudinger inequality outside convex domain, which can be seen as geometric inequality on the Finsler manifold to some extent. Our method is based on constructing capillary Pálya-Szegö rearrangement inequality outside convex domain. Finally, we also consider the capillary Talenti-Comparison principle and Bossel-Daners inequality.

AI.tldr: 建立了凸区域外部的尖锐毛细管Sobolev不等式和Moser-Trudinger不等式，推广了凸区域外的毛细管几何不等式理论。
AI.motivation: 虽然ℝⁿ和凸锥内的尖锐几何不等式理论已发展成熟，但凸区域外部的尖锐毛细管几何不等式研究较少；Fusco-Julin-Morini-Pratelli最近获得了尖锐毛细管等周不等式，为研究凸区域外的毛细管几何不等式奠定了基础。
AI.techniques: 基于构造凸区域外的毛细管Pálya-Szegö重排不等式，将问题转化为Finsler流形上的几何不等式。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了凸区域外的尖锐毛细管Sobolev不等式和Moser-Trudinger不等式，并考虑了毛细管Talenti比较原理和Bossel-Daners不等式。
AI.significance: 扩展了毛细管几何不等式理论到凸区域外部情形，建立了与Finsler几何的联系，为研究带边界条件的几何不等式提供了新框架。

title: The Poisson problem in domains with Ahlfors regular boundary
summary: We establish well posedness of the Poisson problem in weak local John domains, for linear second order elliptic equations with real coefficients, and with data in weighted Lebesgue spaces with a very broad range of acceptable parameters.

AI.tldr: 在弱局部John域中建立了具有实系数的二阶椭圆方程Poisson问题的适定性，数据位于加权Lebesgue空间且参数范围广泛。
AI.motivation: 研究在非光滑区域（弱局部John域）上二阶椭圆方程的Poisson问题，这类区域比经典区域更一般，包含许多不规则几何结构。需要处理加权Lebesgue空间中的数据，这在应用数学和偏微分方程理论中具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用加权函数空间理论、椭圆正则性估计、John域几何分析，以及可能涉及极大函数方法、Calderón-Zygmund理论等工具来处理非光滑边界和加权空间。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在弱局部John域中，具有实系数的线性二阶椭圆方程的Poisson问题在加权Lebesgue空间中适定，且所允许的权重参数范围非常广泛。
AI.significance: 扩展了椭圆方程理论到更一般的几何区域，为处理不规则边界问题提供了理论基础，在数学物理、几何分析等领域有重要应用，特别是对于加权空间的研究有助于理解奇异系数和边界行为。

title: Global Well-Posedness and Conditional Asymptotic Stability for a Coupled Wave-MGT System with Logarithmic Nonlinearity

AI.tldr: 研究波方程与MGT方程耦合系统的间接稳定化，通过引入耦合变量揭示能量结构，建立全局适定性和条件渐近稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究保守波方程与耗散MGT方程耦合系统的稳定化问题，波方程带有对数源项且无直接阻尼，旨在通过MGT方程的耗散间接稳定波方程，避免依赖不合理的指数衰减假设。
AI.techniques: 引入耦合变量w=v+τv_t揭示能量结构，构造耦合势井和稳定集，应用模态分析识别高频谱障碍，使用LaSalle不变性原理建立条件渐近稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立弱解的全局适定性（初始数据在势井深度以下且位于稳定集内）；2) 证明能量通过MGT分量严格耗散；3) 识别线性化系统的高频谱障碍；4) 建立零平衡点的条件渐近稳定性。
AI.significance: 为波-MGT耦合系统提供了结构一致的间接稳定化理论，避免了传统交叉乘子方法，揭示了耗散传递的局限性，对理解耦合系统的稳定机制有重要理论意义。

title: Nonlocal Fisher information: lifting, local limit, and the Blachman-Stam inequality
summary: We show that the nonlocal Fisher information - defined as the entropy dissipation of the Boltzmann entropy for nonlocal heat equations - admits a natural lifting in the sense of Guillen and Silvestre (2025). Important examples include the discrete Fisher information arising in Markov chains and the fractional Fisher information $i_s$ associated with the fractional Laplacian $(-Δ)^{s}$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$, $s\in (0,1)$. We further establish a Blachman-Stam inequality (BSI) for the fractional Fisher information $i_s$, and prove that, for a large class of functions, $i_s$ converges to the classical Fisher information as $s\to 1$. Through this nonlocal-to-local limit, we recover the classical BSI and the lifting property of the classical Fisher information.

AI.tldr: 建立了非局部Fisher信息的提升性质，证明了分数Fisher信息的Blachman-Stam不等式，并通过非局部到局部极限恢复了经典结果。
AI.motivation: 研究非局部热方程中Boltzmann熵耗散定义的非局部Fisher信息，特别是离散Markov链中的离散Fisher信息和分数Laplacian相关的分数Fisher信息，探索其与经典Fisher信息的关系。
AI.techniques: 使用Guillen和Silvestre的提升框架，建立分数Fisher信息的Blachman-Stam不等式，通过非局部到局部极限分析收敛性。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 非局部Fisher信息具有自然提升性质；2) 分数Fisher信息满足Blachman-Stam不等式；3) 分数Fisher信息在s→1时收敛到经典Fisher信息；4) 通过极限恢复经典BSI和Fisher信息的提升性质。
AI.significance: 统一了非局部与经典Fisher信息理论，建立了分数Fisher信息的基本不等式，为非局部扩散方程和Markov链的熵分析提供了新工具。

title: The Cahn--Hilliard--Darcy--Forchheimer system with surfactant: Existence and long-time behavior of global weak solutions
summary: We consider a diffuse-interface model for two-phase incompressible viscous flows with a soluble surfactant in a bounded porous medium. This hydrodynamic system consists of a Darcy--Forchheimer equation for the seepage velocity $\boldsymbol{u}$ coupled with two Cahn--Hilliard equations involving Flory--Huggins type singular potentials, one for the phase-field variable $φ$, the difference in volume fractions of the two fluids, and the other for the surfactant concentration $ψ$. We study the initial boundary value problem in two or three dimensions, with impermeability boundary conditions for $\boldsymbol{u}$ and homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions for $(φ, ψ)$ and their associated chemical potentials. First, we establish the existence of global weak solutions via an implicit-explicit time-discretization scheme based on the energy dissipation law. Furthermore, applying the seminal results of the first and third authors (arXiv:2510.17296), we prove that every weak solution satisfying an energy inequality converges to a single equilibrium as time tends to infinity. In sharp contrast with the available literature on similar models, in this case weak solutions are enough to guarantee the uniqueness of asymptotic limits, without the necessity of any further eventual regularization.

AI.tldr: 建立了多孔介质中可溶表面活性剂两相流动的扩散界面模型的全局弱解存在性，并证明了所有满足能量不等式的弱解都收敛到单一平衡态
AI.motivation: 研究多孔介质中带有可溶表面活性剂的两相不可压缩粘性流动的扩散界面模型，该模型结合了Darcy-Forchheimer渗流方程和两个具有Flory-Huggins型奇异势的Cahn-Hilliard方程，分别描述相场变量和表面活性剂浓度
AI.techniques: 基于能量耗散定律的隐式-显式时间离散化方案；利用作者先前关于能量耗散系统收敛性的理论结果；弱解框架下的渐近分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了全局弱解的存在性；2. 证明了所有满足能量不等式的弱解都收敛到单一平衡态；3. 在弱解框架下即可保证渐近极限的唯一性，无需额外的正则化
AI.significance: 首次在弱解框架下证明了多孔介质中表面活性剂两相流动模型的全局收敛性，避免了文献中常见的额外正则化要求，为复杂多相流系统的渐近行为分析提供了新方法

title: Cross-diffusion and fast-reaction in pattern formation: a structural analysis
summary: Cross-diffusion systems play a central role in mathematical modelling, in which density-dependent dispersal and multiscale mechanisms can lead to spatial segregation and diffusion-driven instabilities. In several relevant examples, including generalised SKT-type competition models, cross-diffusion terms can be rigorously derived as fast-reaction limits, thereby providing a clear biological interpretation while posing significant analytical challenges. In this work, we investigate the impact of biologically derived cross-diffusion on Turing instability. For a generalised SKT framework, we characterise instability conditions for a broad class of cross-diffusion functions arising from fast-reaction mechanisms. We then propose an alternative fast-reaction formulation leading to a different diffusion structure and show that, in this case, diffusion-driven pattern formation is prevented. We further discuss an example motivated by dietary diversity and starvation dynamics, and analyse how the sign structure of the reaction Jacobian interacts with cross-diffusion in determining the onset of patterns. Our results clarify structural features that promote or inhibit spatial self-organisation in competitive systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了广义SKT型竞争模型中生物启发的交叉扩散对图灵不稳定性的影响，揭示了促进或抑制空间自组织的结构特征。
AI.motivation: 交叉扩散系统在数学建模中具有核心地位，密度依赖的扩散和多尺度机制可导致空间分离和扩散驱动的不稳定性。许多相关模型（包括广义SKT型竞争模型）中的交叉扩散项可通过快速反应极限严格推导，这提供了清晰的生物学解释但带来了显著的分析挑战。
AI.techniques: 使用快速反应极限方法推导交叉扩散项，分析广义SKT框架下的图灵不稳定性条件，研究反应雅可比矩阵的符号结构与交叉扩散在模式形成中的相互作用。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对由快速反应机制产生的一类广泛交叉扩散函数，刻画了不稳定性条件；2. 提出了一种替代的快速反应公式，导致不同的扩散结构，并证明在此情况下扩散驱动模式形成被阻止；3. 分析了反应雅可比矩阵符号结构与交叉扩散在决定模式出现中的相互作用。
AI.significance: 阐明了竞争系统中促进或抑制空间自组织的结构特征，为理解生物启发的交叉扩散对图灵模式形成的影响提供了理论框架，对生态学和生物数学建模具有重要启示。

title: Cohesive Membranes under determinant constraints
summary: This paper is devoted to the variational derivation of reduced models for elastic membranes with fracture under constraints on the determinant of the deformation gradient. We consider two physically relevant settings: the non-interpenetration regime, in which the deformation is required to be orientation-preserving ($\det \nabla u > 0$), and the incompressible regime, in which the deformation preserves volume ($\det \nabla u = 1$). In both cases, the surface energy density is allowed to depend on the jump amplitude, thus encompassing cohesive fracture models with activation threshold. The main technical contribution is the construction of recovery sequences that simultaneously satisfy the determinant constraint and optimize the surface energy. This is achieved through a combination of $C^\infty$ diffeomorphisms converging to the identity (which rotate the normal to the jump set so as to minimize the reduced surface energy), and a new smooth approximation result for $GSBV^p$ functions.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过变分方法推导了在变形梯度行列式约束下弹性膜断裂的简化模型，包括非穿透和不可压缩两种物理情形。
AI.motivation: 研究弹性膜在断裂情况下的简化模型，特别关注两种物理相关情形：非穿透区域（要求变形保持定向，det∇u>0）和不可压缩区域（要求变形保持体积，det∇u=1）。这两种情形在弹性材料和生物组织建模中具有重要物理意义。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：1）构造恢复序列，同时满足行列式约束并优化表面能；2）使用收敛到恒等映射的C∞微分同胚来旋转跳跃集的法向量以最小化简化表面能；3）GSBV^p函数的新光滑逼近结果。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了在行列式约束下弹性膜断裂的变分简化模型，证明了恢复序列的存在性，使得模型能够同时处理非穿透和不可压缩约束，并包含具有激活阈值的粘聚断裂模型。
AI.significance: 该工作为弹性膜断裂提供了严格的数学框架，特别处理了行列式约束这一技术难点，对弹性材料断裂、生物组织力学和粘聚断裂模型的理论发展具有重要意义。
